MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Nasir Patel is present in pro per.
Defendants Paul Galindo and Brandon Louisa Jerez are present.
Attorney Kavita Sharma representing the defendants through limited scope.

The settlement attorney JIm Weixel, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle.

The trial date of NOV-07-2011 remains on calendar.
